# Connector depth ladder

_Generated by `scripts/connector-depth-ladder.mjs`. Heuristic. Lowest level first._

**161 connectors graded.** The ladder turns thin wrappers into a visible quality system.

| Level | Meaning | Count |
|------:|---------|------:|
| L1 Wrapper | calls the API | 101 |
| L2 Reliable | + error handling and (resilience or a test) | 60 |
| L3 Memory-aware | + remembers context (env/memory defaults) | 0 |
| L4 Proactive | + source/freshness stamp and next-step hints | 0 |
| L5 Agentic | + chains tools / recipes | 0 |

## How to climb

- **L2 Reliable:** structured errors + a timeout/429 path or a colocated test.
- **L3 Memory-aware:** read defaults from env/args/memory (e.g. PTV home stop).
- **L4 Proactive:** stamp `source`/`fetched_at` and return `next_steps` (see `ptv-tool.ts`).
- **L5 Agentic:** chain tools into recipes.

Heuristic, source-pattern based; confirm by reading the connector before relying on a grade.
